The Mianah touch

Finished by hand, with a little surprise

Before your print is wrapped and sent, it's embellished by hand — so no two are ever exactly alike. You'll never know quite which bit of magic lands on yours.

A splash of gold

Real gold paint, hand-brushed to catch the light.

A dusting of glitter

A soft shimmer scattered across the blooms.

A few tiny gems

Hand-placed jewels that make each piece one of a kind.

Made for gifting

The gift every mama remembers

Baby showers, first Mother's Days, new-mum "thinking of you" moments — a Mianah print is the kind of gift that makes people well up (in the best way) and stays on their wall for years to come.

Find their print Gift a gallery set
Our story

Mianah began with a single feeling — the quiet weight of a sleeping child, and how impossible it is to hold onto.

So we paint it instead. Every Mianah print celebrates the blooming, blush-cheeked wonder of motherhood in bold colour and thick, joyful brushstrokes — art warm enough to grow up beside. Made to order and shipped, with love, to families across the world.

— made with love, for mothers everywhere
Good to know

Questions, answered

Yes — Mianah ships worldwide. Delivery within the UAE is free; international shipping is a flat $50, with tracked delivery to your door.

Every print is made to order with archival pigment inks and a soft matte finish, so the colours stay vivid for generations.

Each print ships rolled in a sturdy protective tube (or flat for smaller sizes), wrapped with care so it reaches you in perfect condition — anywhere in the world.

Prints are made to order in 2–4 days, then shipped. Most orders arrive within 1–2 weeks depending on your country.

If your print arrives damaged or isn't quite right, contact us within 30 days and we'll reprint or refund it — no fuss.
